description: 6 features connecting ACD MCP server to 3-layer memory, heartbeat, and scheduling systems

features.name: acd_read_memory tool: reads Layer 3 (TACIT-KNOWLEDGE.md), today's Layer 2 daily note, and top-10 Layer 1 graph entities from ~/.memory/vault
acd_write_memory tool: writes a memory event to actp_memory_events via python3 graph_memory.record_event() with event_type, content, importance_score, source, metadata
acd_heartbeat_status tool: reads actp_agent_health_snapshots from Supabase (latest 3 rows) and returns service up/down counts, last_seen, pipeline status
acd_schedule tool: writes a job entry to harness/schedule.json with slug, targetPath, model, schedule (once|daily|weekly), runAt (ISO datetime), enabled: true
acd_list_scheduled tool: reads harness/schedule.json, checks PID liveness for running slugs, returns { pending, running, completed } job lists with next run times

Heartbeat trigger in run-harness-v2.js: after each session completes or fails, auto-call acd_write_memory with event_type=session_complete, slug, features_passed, features_total, importance_score based on pass rate
